description: Local-first AI identity for MCP coding tools. Lessons, decisions, and context you control.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Force UTF-8 stdio frames on Windows-style consoles.
environmentVariables.name: PYTHONIOENCODING

packageArguments.description: Run the server over standard MCP stdio transport.
packageArguments.name: --transport
